name: Xtra HERO Wonderkid
desc:
1 "HERO" or "Neo-Spacian" monster
Monsters this card points to are treated as "Elemental HERO" monsters.
If this card is Link Summoned: You can add 1 "HERO" monster, or 1 monster that mentions "Polymerization", from your Deck to your hand, then discard 1 card.
You can banish this card and 1 other "HERO" monster from your GY; add 1 monster with 1000 or less ATK from your GY to your hand.
You can only use each effect of "Xtra HERO Wonderkid" once per turn.
